{{CargoOrgan
|name=Sensei's Lost Finger
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10936
|idx=137
|description=This severed finger comes from a Yamato master, who was famous for his finger techniques in his youth, captivating countless young women. A poem says: "Who is the peak at the end of finger techniques, once seen, Kato's path becomes empty!"
|skill=
|hp=2580
|def=258
|atk=253
|rush=301
|gene1=Water DMG +2%
|gene2=Each round, {race} ATK +80
|gene3=Each round, {race} RUSH +80
|gene4=RUSH Ignore DEF +4%
|gene5=Crit DMG +10%
|gene6=Ignore DEF +2%
|gene7=Crit DMG +10% (Awakened)
|}}
